children.heading: Rail employer
children.label: a Rail employer
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “rail employer” means any person who is an employer as defined in section 1 of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act.

children.heading: Rail wages
children.label: b Rail wages
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “rail wages” means, with respect to any calendar month, so much of the remuneration paid during such month which is subject to contributions under section 8(a) of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act.

children.heading: Employee representative
children.label: c Employee representative
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “employee representative” has the meaning given such term by section 1 of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act.

children.heading: Certain rules made applicable
children.label: d Certain rules made applicable
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, rules similar to the rules of section 3307 and 3308 shall apply.
